prestazioni: Upgrade to a **GM Ultium Drive e-motor (EDU-100/EDU-200) overclocked firmware** via **HP Tuners EV Pro** to push peak torque from 11,500 lb-ft to **13,200 lb-ft** while maintaining 800V battery thermal stability with a **Magna PT’s liquid-cooled stator sleeve kit** for sustained 0-60 mph in **2.8s** (stock: 3.0s).

Install **Brembo GT 8-piston monobloc calipers (09.9905.75)** with **390mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (Brembo CCMR)** and **Ferodo DS-ONE EV-specific pads** to reduce 60-0 mph braking distance from 118 ft to **98 ft**, paired with **Bosch MS-EV ABS recalibration** for regenerative braking optimization.

Replace the stock **Hummer EV’s air suspension (Adaptive Ride Control)** with **Öhlins TTX 46 coilovers (HUM-EV-001)** and **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs** for a **2.5-inch drop** while retaining **4.9-inch wheel travel** for off-road articulation, paired with **Bilstein B16 remote-reservoir shocks** for Baja 1000-level damping.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (RB-HUMMER-EV-22)** with **carbon-fiber fender flares (12-inch extension)** and **custom aluminum inner fender liners** to accommodate **37x13.5R22LT Nitto Ridge Grappler tires** on **HRE FF107 22x12.5 ET15 wheels** with **custom beadlock rings**.

Install a **Seibon Carbon Hummer EV roof panel (SC-22-HUM-EV)** with **integrated LED light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro)** and **carbon-fiber A-pillar covers** to reduce weight by **42 lbs** while improving aerodynamics via **Vortex Generators (AeroCatch VG-003)** on the hood.

Replace the stock grille with a **custom CNC-machined aluminum mesh (T6-6061, 3mm thickness)** from **Forgeline Motorsports**, featuring **electroplated gold accents** and **integrated 4-inch LED turn signals (Luxx HUM-EV-SIG)** with **dynamic sequential lighting (Luxx Pro v2 controller)** for a signature front-end look.
